page.content: In the analysis of Alphabet's AI model deployment metrics, the data reflects a consistent upward trajectory across various financial and operational indicators over the five-year period.

lines.text: In the analysis of Alphabet's AI model deployment metrics, the data reflects a consistent upward trajectory across various
financial and operational indicators over the five-year period.

page.content: For 2019, revenue was $50M, net income was $10M, CAPEX stood at $5M, ROI was 20%, model accuracy was 85%, deployment cost was $3M, customer growth was 15%, market share was 30%, and R&D expenses totaled $8M. In 2020, revenue increased to $60M, net income reached $12M, CAPEX rose to $6M, ROI improved to 25%, model accuracy climbed to 90%, deployment cost was $4M, customer growth was 20%, market share expanded to 32%, and R&D expenses were $9M. The year 2021 saw revenue of $75M, net income of $15M, CAPEX at $8M, ROI at 30%, model accuracy at 92%, deployment cost at $5M, customer growth at 25%, market share at 35%, and R&D expenses of $10M.

lines.text: For 2019, revenue was $50M, net income was $10M, CAPEX stood at $5M, ROI was 20%, model accuracy was 85%,
deployment cost was $3M, customer growth was 15%, market share was 30%, and R&D expenses totaled $8M. In 2020,
revenue increased to $60M, net income reached $12M, CAPEX rose to $6M, ROI improved to 25%, model accuracy climbed to
90%, deployment cost was $4M, customer growth was 20%, market share expanded to 32%, and R&D expenses were $9M.
The year 2021 saw revenue of $75M, net income of $15M, CAPEX at $8M, ROI at 30%, model accuracy at 92%, deployment
cost at $5M, customer growth at 25%, market share at 35%, and R&D expenses of $10M.

page.content: For 2022, revenue was $90M, net income was $18M, CAPEX was $10M, ROI was 35%, model accuracy achieved 93%, deployment cost was $6M, customer growth was 30%, market share was 38%, and R&D expenses totaled $12M. Additionally, monthly active users grew from 50M in 2020 to 75M in 2025, with corresponding revenue increasing from $200M to $350M, net income from $50M to $75M, CAPEX from $10M to $15M, and ARPU rising from $4.00 to $4.67.
